'''Badji''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] working for Captain [[Andel]] in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. A [[0 ABY/Legends|short time]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Andel's group attempted to pirate a freighter in the space in [[Purnham system/Legends|Purnham system]]. However, they were stopped by the [[Hand of Judgment]] with help from [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Badji was captured. [[Korlo Brightwater]] questioned him about the [[BloodScar]] pirate, [[Caaldra]], but he was unable to answer all of Brightwater's questions.
